query: SELECT id, name, status, updatedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) as seconds_since_update FROM labSimulations WHERE status = 'scanning' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute SELECT id, name, status, updatedAt, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, updatedAt, NOW()) as seconds_since_update FROM labSimulations WHERE status = 'scanning' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
